sub_modules.conv1d_window: Combinational tap-window mapper that combines the current input sample with the four delayed samples.
sub_modules.conv1d_mac5: Combinational fixed 5-tap multiply-accumulate block using kernel weights [2, 8, 12, 8, 2].
sub_modules.conv1d_normalize: Combinational normalization block that right-shifts the MAC result by GAIN_W.
sub_modules.conv1d_valid_gate: Combinational valid path that forwards valid_in to valid_out with zero latency.
